creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
Created attachment 215133
Updates fastdfs, php module and shared lib to 6.06

Attached patch updates these ports to 6.06;
devel/libfastcommon
ftp/fastdfs
ftp/php-fastdfs

All three passes portlint -AC + poudriere testport

Changelog:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/happyfish100/fastdfs/master/HISTORY
